text:
Night Jade (闇のヒスイ) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

Summary

Night Jade (闇のヒスイ): This card allows the caster to summon forth a night jade jewel. When danger is about to befall its owner, it will deflect it randomly to somebody else.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.073 :: 闇のヒスイ 
悪魔の加護を受けた宝石。持ち主に危機がふりかかりそうになると、他人にその厄災を渡してしまう。
|-
![Eng]
|No.073 :: Night Jade 
Jewellery that has received the blessings of the devil. When crisis is about to befall its owner, it is randomly pass the disaster to others.
|}
